Who We Are

About The Shop of AG

A full-service automotive repair company dedicated to providing reliable, honest, and high-quality vehicle care in Starke, Florida.

Our Story

Committed to Dependable
Automotive Care

At The Shop of AG, we are committed to delivering dependable automotive repair services with exceptional customer care. Our experienced technicians use industry-leading tools and techniques to accurately diagnose and repair vehicle issues, helping customers get back on the road safely and efficiently.

We specialize in diagnosing, repairing, and maintaining a wide range of domestic and foreign vehicles, ensuring safe and dependable transportation for our customers. We pride ourselves on transparency, integrity, and quality workmanship.

Whether it's routine maintenance or major repairs, our goal is to provide trustworthy solutions that keep vehicles performing at their best.

Our Core Values

What We Stand For

Every decision we make comes back to these four principles.

🤝

Integrity

We are honest in everything we do — from pricing to the repairs we recommend. Your trust is our most valuable asset.

🔬

Expertise

Our technicians are experienced across all makes and models, using the best tools and techniques the industry offers.

⭐

Quality

We don't cut corners. Every repair is done right the first time, with quality parts and meticulous attention to detail.

❤️

Community

We're proud members of the Starke community. Building lasting relationships with our neighbors is what drives us every day.
